ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crowdfunding_projects" (
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crowdfunding project */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the contact person associated with the project */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or individual behind the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description detailing the project */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Financial goal of the project in the specified currency */,
  "pledged" INTEGER /* Total amount pledged by backers */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Count of backers who contributed to the project */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is launched */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for pledges */,
  "launched_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was launched */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project ends */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the category under which the project falls */,
  "subcategory_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the subcategory under which the project is classified */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "visibility_status" TEXT /* Visibility status of the project (e.g., public, private) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the project's social media profiles */,
  "project_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's image */,
  "project_video_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crowdfunding_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crowdfunding_projects_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES categories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crowdfunding_projects_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact person */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the contact person */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the contact person is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the contact person is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the contact person's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the contact person is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "subcategory_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory under the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description detailing the category or subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id", "subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome record */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crowdfunding project the outcome pertains to */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description detailing the outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was recorded */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the project's outcome (e.g., lack of funding, successful marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_outcomes_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES crowdfunding_projects ("cf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crowdfunding project the pledge pertains to */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer who made the pledge */,
  "pledge_amount" INTEGER /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "pledge_date" TEXT /* Date when the pledge was made */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward chosen by the backer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES crowdfunding_projects ("cf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the backer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crowdfunding project the reward pertains to */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description detailing the reward */,
  "reward_price" INTEGER /* Price of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES crowdfunding_projects ("cf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crowdfunding project the update pertains to */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text detailing the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_cf_id FOREIGN KEY ("cf_id") REFERENCES crowdfunding_projects ("cf_id")
)
